message:
feat(util): add today/yesterday time keywords, DST-safe helpers, and multiline markdown import

- time.rs: add support for "today" (5pm) and "yesterday" (9am) keywords in
  parse_flexible_timestamp() and parse_relative_time(), complementing existing
  "tomorrow" support
- time.rs: add local_to_utc() and local_to_utc_opt() helper functions that
  handle DST gap transitions gracefully by shifting forward 1 hour when a time
  falls in a spring-forward gap, preventing "time doesn't exist" panics
- markdown_import.rs: change import to preserve all lines before the first H3
  heading as implicit description content, instead of only capturing the first
  non-empty line; enables multi-line lead-ins for imported issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
